summary: Critical failures against requirements. Task mandates red/green TDD with bats-core testing framework; deliverable uses only inline bash tests in workflow, skipping bats entirely. Workflow lacks: actionlint validation, act-result.txt artifact creation, proper test output capture/assertion, and verifiable test harness. Script itself has good bash hygiene (set -euo pipefail, error handling) but glob_to_regex character class handling is incomplete ([...] brackets not properly escaped). Workflow has repetitive inline tests (lines 27-90) that should be factored into bats test file. No verification that tests actually pass or output matches expected values; just echoes statements without assertions.
